title: Blisscraft
description: A modpack in search for the best Minecraft experience with something in it for all kinds of players, without using excessive resources.
body:
# Welcome to Blisscraft!

With this modpack, I aimed to expand upon experiences for players of all kinds and preferences, from builders, to adventurers, and automators. It has something for everyone, yet keeps it as accessible as possible and not losing the sandbox style. At the same time, I wanted to be thoughtful and thorough with my choices, making the mods not only work well on their own, but with each other as well to make a feature-complete game.

**Full version of the modpack requires 4GB allocated RAM. Lite version requires just 2.5GB.**

## Features

- Support for **controllers!**
- Fully optimized out of the box
- Revamped combat mechanics inspired on the Mojang combat test
- Fluid **third-person gameplay** with *Shoulder Surfing Reloaded**
- ***Essential Mod*** and ***e4mc*** included out of the box so you can play with friends easily anytime
- Neater look without losing the vanilla feel with ***[Stay True](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/stay-true)*** resource pack
- The **Otherside** and many interesting additions to the Ancient City alongside a brand new tier of equipment and new utilities from the Deep Dark
- Revamped structures and villages everywhere you go
- ***BetterEnd*** and ***BetterNether*** bringing a vastly improved experience to their respective dimensions
- ***Farmer's Delight*** with many add-ons, including integrations with the revamped approach of the End and the Nether
- ***Create*** with several add-ons and interactions with other mods from the pack to make it feel like a feature-complete game
- Build your dreams with many **added furtniture items, vertical placements for slabs and stairs and diagonal fences and walls** alongside the illustrious Macaw's mods
- **Revamped copper**: copper hoppers for simpler item separators, and the addition of tin ore that can be combined with copper to make bronze and a brand new set of tools and armor
- **Mobs and creatures** that lost the mob votes from ***Friends&Foes***, brand new ones from ***Ecologics*** and realistic bees - and of course, all well-integrated with the other mods
- **Several new structures and dungeons**
- **Improved overworld generation** with ***Ecologics***
- See further away than ever before with ***Distant Horizons***, and enjoy a better look without breaking the bank with ***MakeUp Ultra Fast*** shaders*
- **MANY quality of life improvements**: sleeping bags, backpacks, dynamic lights, improved enchantment and anvil mechanics, ***Roughly Enough Items***, inventory profiles, Elytra equipping on cape slot allowing you to use chest armor, ***Inventory Totems*** and much, MUCH more

Items marked with * are **not featured in the Lite versions**.

A massive thanks to all the Minecraft modding community and all the developers that made all the mods used in this modpack possible.

<details>
<summary>Full mod list</summary>

Items marked with * are **not featured in the Lite versions**.
